calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
ATTY. JENNIFER TROIA appeared for the Petitioner: Mary Stewart, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor Traci Rogers was sworn and examined.
ATTY. ERIN O'DONOHUE OF THE LEGAL SERVICES FOR CHILDREN ALSO APPEARED FOR THE MINOR.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minors were made at the hearing.
In open court, Application to Dispense with Notice is granted.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: ALLEN BERNARD STEWART-HAYES.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Reset To Nov-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
erin O'Donahue, Esq. special appearance for Petitioner: Mary Stewart, as Guardian ad litem for Traci Rogers, a Minor Mother of a Minor Child.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing.
Matter is continuned to Nov. 27, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for the filing of an Application and Declaration in support of Order Dispensing with Notice to Minor's Parent and for an appointment of Guardian ad litem.
The Court waived requirement for Re-Publication.
